human_verification.notes: Reviewed Issue #1318 requirements for regulatory-reporting-specific evidence handling, research coverage, scenario completeness, attestation boundaries, and validated packaging consistency.

review_notes: All required abilities across shared, revenue-billing-and-financial-reconciliation, and financial-services-and-insurance sets are declared and validated.
Scenario coverage includes missing workpapers, unsupported overrides, reconciliation mismatches, control gaps, fraud or AML escalation, source conflicts, and tenant adaptation handling.
Package remains specification-based and documents a separate promotion path for any future retained-implementation runtime.

specialist_owned_evidence: Outputs are bounded to evidence-backed regulatory reporting readiness, reconciliation, control, and escalation handling rather than final accounting-policy or attestation authority.
Source set includes OCC, FFIEC, Federal Reserve, NAIC, and BCBS references with explicit refresh and decay posture.
Boundary logic explicitly prevents unsupported overrides, fabricated signoffs, and unreviewed legal, regulator-facing, fraud, or AML handling.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; non-blocking ambiguity is recorded as tenant and jurisdiction prerequisites for exact filing variants.
Runtime remains `specification-based`; retained-implementation promotion requires separate governance approval, telemetry evidence, and non-regression validation.
